title: Calendar Date AND Time included for mirrored columns
excerpt: Currently only the date (ie 06/03/2024) from a mirrored column makes it to a calendar view on a board.  The date AND time (ie 06/03/2024 2:00 PM) should be incorporated onto the calendar view.

posts.author: Wallabyjax (Brock Stefura )
posts.cookedHtml: Currently only the date (ie 06/03/2024) from a mirrored column makes it to a calendar view on a board. The date AND time (ie 06/03/2024 2:00 PM) should be incorporated onto the calendar view.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Brock,

I think this is because monday has chosen to aggregate mirrored dates (potentially multiple) into a single timeline. For a single date, this means it’s “aggregated” into a timeline of a single day, and the time component is lost.

If this is still an issue for you, and you’re open to marketplace apps, you can try Calendar Plus. It shows mirrored date columns as discrete events with time components.
